ops.text:
RESULTS E32 + VERIFY (VERIFY-confirmed to float precision — independent DeLong/AUC/MDE, zero cc_steer stat imports; total $22.19 under $25 cap). DECISIVE NEGATIVE: full-fidelity many-shot sonnet watcher does NOT match the FT qwen3-8b incumbent. best_k=125: AUC 0.8669 on n=620 (98.7% of the 628; incumbent-on-scope 0.9306) vs incumbent 0.9317. Paired DeLong: delta = -0.0638, 95% CI [-0.0928, -0.0347] (excludes 0), MDE 0.0416, z=-4.30 → actionable=True IN THE INCUMBENT'S FAVOR (prompt-only many-shot significantly AND materially worse). Co-primary cost ~$26.88/1k eval turns — expensive ops story even setting the gap aside. Answers the "prompts instead of FT for the watcher" question: no.

Two structural findings (handled without improvising the science):
1. ARG_MAX CEILING (sharper than context): K=250's ~1.48M-char exemplar prefix overflows the OS ARG_MAX (1,048,576 B) on the CLI `--system-prompt` argv → OSError Errno 7 BEFORE any model call. Max feasible ≈186 exemplars (~481k prefix tokens). So best_k=125 forced; the 125→250 trend is physically uncomputable (and moot — the truncated-secondary gate needs within-0.03 of 0.9317, and 0.867 misses by 0.065, so it correctly did NOT run). This is a hard limit on ANY many-shot-via-claude-CLI approach.
2. TRAIN CORPUS NOT BIT-FROZEN (reproducibility caveat, VERIFY-caught, verdict-neutral): re-deriving the seed-32 exemplar prefix now yields ~3-4% different char counts (draft_text() content drifted between run and re-check), so the exemplar prefixes aren't perfectly reproducible — but the persisted probs reproduce EXACTLY, both char counts land the same side of ARG_MAX, and disjointness holds (0 shared sessions/ids with the 628). No verdict change; flag for any future work that assumes rendered train text is frozen.

$22 abort correctly respected (8 rows unscored on n=620 after two cold-prefix rewrites at ~$2.5 each; primary reported on 98.7% of the frame, not spent past the cap). WAVE 0 NOW CLOSED: E31 ✓ (weak position prior), E32 ✓ (many-shot negative), E33 ✓ (rubric null-but-real → deployment candidate), E34/E35 deferred. Artifacts: ~/.cc-steer/experiments/E32/out/{results.json, report.md, probs/}, screen/ledger.jsonl, verify/.
